message:
feat(core): wire PLANNER-3 join-order permutation into streaming hash-join

bd-a1e52 W5-3: When order_join_inputs_with_hints returns a non-identity
permutation for inner-only multi-table joins, apply it: reorder
table_sources, rebuild all_sources/col_map in permuted order, and match
ON predicates to permuted join steps via equi-pair resolution. Adds Clone
to JoinTableSource. Previously the permutation was computed but discarded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
